nasb.text: and at the dinner hour he sent his slave to say to those who had been invited, ‘Come; for everything is ready now.’

esv.text: And at the time for the banquet he sent his servant  to say to those who had been invited, ‘Come, for everything is now ready.’

cnv.text: 到了開席的時候，他打發僕人去對所請的人說：‘請來吧！樣樣都準備好了。’

ccb.text: 要开席的时候，主人就派奴仆去对客人说，‘一切都准备好了，来赴宴吧！’

csbs.text: 到了宴席的时刻，他派奴仆去对那些被邀请的人说：‘请来吧，一切都已经预备好了！’
